title: The U.S. insists the Iran conflict won't be a 'forever war.' Experts beg to differ
summary_full: President Trump and his officials say the war won't be protracted. Experts say it could go on longer than the White House expects.
summary_public: President Trump and his officials say the war won't be protracted. Experts say it could go on longer than the White House expects.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: U.S. insists the Iran conflict won't be a 'forever war.'
